description: A 4B-parameter causal language model optimized as a fine-tuning base with 262K context length, designed for instruction following and code tasks.
An 8B vision-language model optimized for long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks like browser and desktop automation.
**Jan-v2-VL** is an 8B vision-language model optimized for long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks in software environments like browsers and desktop apps.
An open-source multimodal MoE language model with vision capabilities and 262K context length.
Jan-Nano-128k is a compact non-thinking language model with native 128k context window designed for research applications.
A small, locally-runnable code-tuned model for coding tasks and lightweight agent workflows.
A 4-bit quantized version of Jan-v3-4B-base-instruct converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation, UI control, and multi-step task execution.
8-bit MLX-quantized 8B vision-language model for agentic UI automation and multi-step task execution.
**Summary:** This is an 8B-parameter bfloat16 MLX vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks, converted from Janhq's Jan-v2-VL-high.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of an 8B vision-language model optimized for UI automation and agentic tasks.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of an 8B vision-language model designed for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
An 8-bit quantized MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-low, an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
An 8-bit MLX-quantized 8B vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
This is a bfloat16 MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-low, an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-med, an 8B vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
Olmo 3 Think is a 7B open language model by Ai2 with chain-of-thought reasoning, trained on Dolma 3 and Dolci datasets, excelling at math, coding, and reasoning tasks.

Olmo 3 7B Instruct is an open-source 7B parameter language model by Allen Institute for AI, trained on Dolma 3 data, with strong math and reasoning capabilities, using <|im_start|> chat template and Apache 2.0 license.
MLX-converted text generation model from Kimi-K2.5 for Apple Silicon.
This is a 4-bit quantized Gemma 3 4B Instruct model converted to MLX format for image-text-to-text tasks on Apple Silicon.
MLX-converted GPT-OSS-20B model for text generation.
An MLX-converted automatic speech recognition model for transcribing audio in 24 languages.
MLX speech recognition model for transcribing audio files.
A 4-bit MLX conversion of Mistral's Devstral-Small-2-24B-Instruct-2512 vision language model.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of the Google Gemma 3 12B instruction-tuned model, converted for use with the `mlx-vlm` library.
This is an MLX conversion of the Gemma 3 27B Instruct model.
A 4-bit quantized 1B parameter instruction-tuned Llama 3.2 model converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for sentence embeddings on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-1.7B converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple silicon.
4-bit quantized Qwen3-0.6B model converted to MLX format for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized Qwen3-30B-A3B model converted to MLX format.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of Meta Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model for Apple Silicon.
This is a 4-bit quantized version of the Google Gemma 3 1B instruction-tuned model, converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon using the `mlx-lm` library.
A 4-bit quantized version of Meta's Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple devices.
MLX-converted 8-bit version of GLM-4.7-Flash for text generation.
This is an MLX-converted 8-bit quantized version of OpenAI's GPT-OSS 120B model for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of GLM-4.7-Flash for text generation using the mlx-lm library.
8-bit quantized MLX version of Meta's Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct language model for Apple Silicon.
4-bit quantized GLM-4.7 model converted to MLX format for text generation.
Meta's Llama 3.1 70B instruction-tuned language model, converted to 4-bit MLX format for Apple Silicon.
4-bit MLX quantized version of Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct for text generation on Apple Silicon.
An 8-bit MLX converted version of Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct for Apple Silicon.
8-bit MLX converted version of GLM-4.5-Air for text generation.
An 8-bit quantized Qwen3-0.6B model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
An 8-bit quantized version of Meta's Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model, converted to MLX format for Apple devices.
MLX-converted version of Kimi-K2-Thinking for text generation using mlx-lm.
A 4-bit MLX-quantized version of Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct for text generation on Apple Silicon.
4-bit quantized MLX version of Kimi-K2-Instruct for text generation.
MLX conversion of Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Thinking (4-bit quantized, text generation).
MiniMax-M2.1-8bit is an 8-bit quantized version of MiniMax-M2.1 converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 3-bit quantized version of MiniMax-M2.1 converted to MLX format for text generation.
8-bit MLX version of Meta's Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct for text generation.
A 6-bit quantized version of GLM-4.7-Flash converted to MLX format for text generation using mlx-lm.

DeepSeek-V3.1-4bit is a 4-bit quantized version of DeepSeek-V3.1 converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.

An 8-bit quantized DeepSeek-V3.1 model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon devices.
A 6-bit quantized version of GLM-4.7 converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX-converted 8B parameter instruction-tuned language model from Meta's Llama 3.1, optimized for Apple silicon.
MLX-converted GLM-4.5-Air model for text generation using mlx-lm.
MLX-optimized version of Meta's Llama 3.3 70B Instruct language model for Apple devices.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-8B converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon devices.
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 quantized to 4-bit and converted to MLX format.
A 4-bit quantized version of Google's Gemma 2 2B instruction model, converted to run on Apple Silicon via the MLX framework.
MLX-converted 4-bit Qwen3.5-27B model for image-text-to-text generation.
4-bit quantized MLX version of Qwen3-4B for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 0.6B parameter text-to-speech model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B for image-text-to-text tasks.
A text-to-speech model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX-optimized 4-bit quantized version of Ministral-3-3B-Instruct for image understanding tasks.
A 4-bit MLX-converted version of Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407 for use with mlx-lm.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple devices.
MLX-converted 0.6B text-to-speech model with voice cloning for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct for image-text-to-text generation.
A 4-bit MLX converted version of Google's Gemma 3n E2B model for text generation using the `mlx-lm` library.
MLX-converted Whisper large-v3-turbo model for audio transcription using the mlx-whisper library.
MLX-converted 8-bit Qwen3.5-35B-A3B model for image-text-to-text tasks.
A 4-bit quantized DeepSeek Coder 33B model converted to MLX format for local inference.
MLX format conversion of Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct model in 4-bit precision.
4-bit quantized Gemma 2 9B Instruct model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of Google's Gemma 3N E4B IT model, designed for Apple Silicon and used with the mlx-lm library.
MLX-converted 1.6B vision-language model for image-text tasks.
MLX-converted Qwen text-to-speech model with voice cloning support.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3.5-397B-A17B for image-text-to-text generation.
A 4-bit quantized version of Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.

A 4-bit quantized MLX-converted version of Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct for image-text-to-text tasks.
NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Nano-30B text generation model in 4-bit MLX format for Apple Silicon.
An MLX implementation of Google's EmbeddingGemma model, optimized for sentence similarity tasks on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit nvfp4 quantized version of Qwen3.5-397B-A17B MoE language model optimized for local inference on Apple Silicon Macs via MLX.
A 6-bit MLX quantized version of LiquidAI's LFM2.5-1.2B-Thinking model for text generation.
A 4-bit quantized text generation model converted to MLX format from MiniMax-M2.1.
A 4-bit quantized version of Google's Gemma-3-1b-it model, converted to MLX format for efficient inference on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of LFM2-2.6B for text generation.
MLX-converted OCR model for image-to-text tasks, converted from zai-org/GLM-OCR.
A 4-bit MLX converted version of LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct for text generation.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized GLM-5 text generation model.
MLX-converted 4-bit quantized version of Qwen3-Embedding-4B for sentence similarity and feature extraction.
Quantized GGUF versions of Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct using llama.cpp imatrix, ranging from 2.95GB (IQ2_M) to 32.13GB (f32).
OpenAI's 20B open-weight reasoning model with Apache 2.0 license, MXFP4 quantization, agentic capabilities, and full chain-of-thought support.
**Uncensored GGUF quant of GLM-4.7-Flash optimized for creative fiction writing, storytelling, and roleplaying across all genres.**
Gemma is a lightweight open LLM from Google, offered in 2B/7B sizes, trained on 6T tokens, with CPU/GPU and quantization support.
A quantized, uncensored 20B Mixture of Experts model in GGUF format optimized for creative writing and coding tasks.
A reasoning-distilled version of GLM-4.7-Flash trained on high-reasoning Claude Opus 4.5 data for coding, science, and research tasks.
GGUF-format weights for Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct vision-language model, enabling local inference via llama.cpp/Ollama.
Qwen3-8B-GGUF is an 8B-parameter quantized language model with unique switchable thinking modes for complex reasoning or efficient dialogue.
Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 is a 4B parameter instruction-tuned language model with 262K context length, improved reasoning/coding capabilities, and tool-use support.
Qwen3-4B is a 4B-parameter language model that can switch between thinking mode (for complex reasoning) and non-thinking mode (for efficient dialogue).
A Qwen3-14B model distilled from Claude 4.5 Opus with high reasoning effort, trained for coding, science, and general use.
This is a repository of GGUF quantized versions (12-22GB) of a 20B parameter uncensored instruct model, with various IQ and Q quantization options for different quality/size tradeoffs.
Devstral Small 2 is a 24B open-source AI model specialized in agentic coding and software engineering tasks.
Mixture of Experts model combining 8 Llama 3.2 3B models into an 18.4B uncensored creative writing powerhouse optimized for fiction, roleplay, and vivid prose generation.
Dolphin 3.0 Llama 3.1 8B is a general-purpose steerable instruct model based on Llama 3.1, trained on diverse datasets for coding, math, and agentic tasks.
A 9B parameter multimodal AI model for vision, speech, and full-duplex live streaming on phones.
GGUF quantized Qwen3.5-27B community model by LM Studio.
A 23B parameter Mixture-of-Experts model created by uniformly pruning 25% of experts from GLM-4.7-Flash using the REAP method, maintaining near-original performance while reducing size.
LFM2.5-1.2B-Thinking is a compact 1.2B parameter hybrid AI model by Liquid AI, optimized for on-device deployment and available in GGUF format.
An uncensored 20B Mixture of Experts model optimized for coding and creative tasks, available in multiple quantization formats.
A censorship-removed (abliterated) version of the Qwen3-4b-Z-Image-Turbo text encoder for unrestricted image generation.
GGUF quantized versions of the uncensored Huihui-Qwen3.5-27B-abliterated model in various quantization levels (Q2_K to Q8_0).
GGUF quants of the Huihui-Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-abliterated model.
GGUF quantized versions of the abliterated Huihui-Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B model with various precision options (6.5-25.2GB).
This is an uncensored, experimental version of the Google Gemma 3 27B IT model, created using a new layerwise abliteration technique to remove refusals.
A compact 3.4B parameter vision-language model with multilingual support, optimized for edge deployment and agentic tasks, available in GGUF quantization under Apache 2.0 license.
Quantized GGUF versions of Google's 4B parameter translategemma multi-modal model for local inference.
Quantized GGUF versions of Qwen3.5-27B-heretic, an uncensored large language model, available in various precision levels from Q2_K to Q8_0.
A 2B-parameter vision-language model with visual agent, OCR and multimodal reasoning capabilities.
A 4B parameter fine-tuned Qwen 3 model that expands simple text concepts into detailed, cinematic AI image generation prompts.
Quantized GGUF versions of the Huihui-Qwen3.5-35B-A3B abliterated (uncensored) language model.
An uncensored Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model created via abliteration.
Liquid AI's LFM2-24B-A2B is a 24B MoE model with 2B active parameters designed for efficient on-device/edge deployment.
Google's Gemma 3 27B instruction-tuned multimodal model (text+image to text) in GGUF Q4_0 format with a 128K context window.
Quantized GGUF versions of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-heretic, an uncensored AI model, with multiple quantization levels.

Google Gemma 3 4B is an open, instruction-tuned, multimodal (text+image) model in Q4_0 GGUF format, featuring a 128K context, trained on 4 trillion tokens, excelling in reasoning and multilingual benchmarks but carrying typical LLM limitations like bias and factual errors.
A 3.8B parameter multilingual language model with 128K context, optimized for reasoning, math, and code, featuring Unsloth's bug fixes for padding/EOS tokens and chat templates.
This repository provides GGUF quantized versions of the Nanbeige4.1‑3B language model, ranging from Q2_K to f16.
GGUF quantized versions of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-heretic, an uncensored/abliterated LLM, with multiple quant types from Q2_K to Q8_0.
This is a GGUF quantized version of the Gemma3-27B vision language model with various quantization options (IQ1-Q6) for different quality/size tradeoffs.
Quantized GGUF versions of the Huihui-Qwen3.5-27B abliterated (uncensored) language model with various precision options.
A self-learning 0.5B parameter code generation model optimized for Claude Code with SONA adaptive intelligence and swarm coordination capabilities.
A GGUF-quantized 3B parameter language model converted from Nanbeige4.1-3B for use with llama.cpp.
GGUF quantizations of MiniMax-M2.5-REAP-172B-A10B in various quality levels (IQ1 to Q6).
Google's Gemma 3 is an open, lightweight, multimodal AI model (text+image to text) with a 128K context window.
A decensored, abliterated mxfp4 quantization of Qwen3.5-35B-A3B with reduced refusal rates.
Quantized GGUF versions of Qwen3.5-27B-heretic, an uncensored/abliterated LLM.
Mistral's Ministral 3 8B is a compact, vision-enabled language model optimized for edge deployment with multilingual support and agentic capabilities, licensed under Apache 2.0.
NeuTTS Air is an on-device text-to-speech model with instant voice cloning, built on a 0.5B LLM backbone for real-time, realistic speech synthesis.
Llama.cpp GGUF quantizations of QwQ-32B-abliterated model in various precision levels (9-35GB) for local inference.
Qwen3-8B model distilled from Claude 4.5 Opus high-reasoning data for coding, science, and general use.
Quantized Huihui-Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-abliterated using MXFP4 for MoE and Q8/BF16/FP16 for other tensors, with quality order F32 > BF16 > F16.
A 4B parameter model distilled from Claude Opus 4.5 reasoning data for coding, science, and general use.
Qwen3.5-35B-A3B quantizations using MXFP4 for MoE and Q8/BF16/FP16 for other tensors, with BF16 being highest quality but potentially slower.
Mistral's compact, edge-optimized 14B reasoning model with vision capabilities, supporting multilingual inputs and a 256k context window under Apache 2.0.
A DPO fine-tuned uncensored 8B model, the best-performing uncensored model on Open LLM Leaderboard.
This model is licensed under Apache 2.0.
Tencent's Hunyuan is a multilingual translation model supporting 33 languages in 1.8B and 7B parameter sizes.
An uncensored Qwen3-4B text encoder (GGUF Q4_0) for Flux2 Klein that removes safety filters to allow NSFW content generation.
Quantized GGUF versions of an uncensored Qwen3.5-35B model for research, with significantly reduced safety filtering.
GGUF quants (26-100GB) of the XORTRON.CriminalComputing.LARGE.2026.3 uncensored/abliterated model.
GGUF-quantized 122B multimodal LLM with PRISM over-refusal removal.
GGUF quantized versions of a 4B code exploration agent distilled from Qwen3-Coder-Next for local agent loops with tool-calling.
LFM2-8B-A1B is an efficient on-device mixture-of-experts model (8.3B total/1.5B active params) designed for edge AI deployment with strong quality-speed performance.
The-Crow-9B is an 8.7GB character AI model fine-tuned for roleplay and creative writing, achieving 63% on EQBench emotional intelligence benchmarks.
Quantized Qwen3.5 MoE (80B active/122B total) optimized for quality and speed on Strix Halo and similar systems, achieving better results than homogeneous Q6_K with 100k-200k+ ctx support.
A 4-bit quantized cybersecurity LLM with removed safety guardrails for CTF and penetration testing.
GGUF quantized 122B multimodal Qwen model with PRISM pipeline removing over-refusal behaviors.
